diagram_title: Claude Native Provider — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Host
systems.description: Bun runtime hosting the opencode application, plugin system, and provider framework

systems.name: Anthropic Platform
systems.description: Anthropic's OAuth and Messages API services

containers.name: libclaude_provider.so
containers.description: C11 shared library implementing Anthropic OAuth, transport, and streaming

containers.name: opencode Plugin System
containers.description: TypeScript plugin loader and FFI binding layer

containers.name: claude-provider CLI
containers.description: Standalone executable for testing and stdio JSON bridge

containers.name: Anthropic OAuth
containers.description: OAuth 2.0 PKCE authorization and token service

containers.name: Anthropic Messages API
containers.description: Claude model inference API with SSE streaming

components.name: Provider Lifecycle
components.description: Plugin init/shutdown, global state, model catalog

components.name: Auth Manager
components.description: OAuth PKCE flow, device code, token refresh, credential lifecycle

components.name: Credential Storage
components.description: Persistent auth.json read/write with file permission enforcement

components.name: Request Transformer
components.description: Claude Code protocol: mcp_ prefix, system prompt, attribution hash, beta flag

components.name: HTTP Transport
components.description: libcurl HTTP POST with TLS, custom headers, streaming callback

components.name: SSE Stream Parser
components.description: Anthropic Messages API SSE event parsing and dispatch

components.name: FFI Binding
components.description: Bun FFI dlopen wrapper, struct marshalling, TypeScript interface

components.name: CLI Main
components.description: Stdio JSON bridge for standalone testing

relationships.description: dlopen + FFI call: init, shutdown, abi_version, get_models, strerror
FFI call: login_start, login_exchange, refresh_token, logout, get_auth_status
Try native load first; on failure, fallback to C10
Feed raw SSE bytes to stream parser
Get User-Agent string for request headers
